scheme_name: NSP Merit Scholarship
benefits: Tuition fee support and maintenance allowance for meritorious undergraduate students.
eligibility_text: Applicants must be Punjab residents enrolled in a recognised undergraduate or engineering programme with annual family income up to INR 8,00,000.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal, complete Aadhaar verification, upload required documents, and submit through the institution for verification.

scheme_name: AICTE Pragati
benefits: Financial assistance for girl students admitted to technical degree or diploma courses.
eligibility_text: Girl students admitted to first year or second year lateral entry of AICTE-approved technical degree or diploma courses may apply. Family income should not exceed INR 8,00,000 per annum.
application_process: Register on NSP, choose AICTE Pragati, fill academic and bank details, upload documents, and submit for institute verification.

scheme_name: UGC Scholarship
benefits: Monthly scholarship support for undergraduate studies in recognised universities and colleges.
eligibility_text: Students enrolled in undergraduate courses at recognised institutions may apply subject to income and academic eligibility rules listed by UGC.
application_process: Apply through NSP or the UGC scholarship portal when applications open, upload documents, and complete institute verification.

scheme_name: Punjab Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefits: Reimbursement of compulsory non-refundable fees and maintenance allowance for eligible SC students.
eligibility_text: SC students domiciled in Punjab and studying post-matric courses may apply if annual family income is within the notified ceiling.
application_process: Apply on the Punjab scholarship portal, upload required certificates, and route the application through the institution.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scheme for College Students
benefits: Annual scholarship for meritorious college and university students from low-income families.
eligibility_text: Students above the 80th percentile in Class 12 and pursuing regular UG or PG courses may apply, subject to income criteria.
application_process: Apply through NSP, select the Central Sector scheme, upload documents, and submit before the deadline.

scheme_name: Haryana Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
benefits: Maintenance allowance and fee reimbursement for backward class students.
eligibility_text: OBC/BC students residing in Haryana studying in recognized colleges/universities with annual family income up to 1.5 lakhs.
application_process: Register on the Har-Chhatrabratti portal, complete Aadhaar e-KYC, fill out academic credentials, and submit.

scheme_name: Haryana Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefits: 100% tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance support.
eligibility_text: Scheduled Caste students domiciled in Haryana, enrolled in post-matriculation courses with annual family income below 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Register on Har-Chhatrabratti portal, upload documents, and get online verification from institution.

scheme_name: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Fee Reimbursement
benefits: 50% tuition and exam fee reimbursement for professional courses.
eligibility_text: Students admitted under general category in professional courses in Maharashtra, with annual family income up to 8 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on the MahaDBT portal, select the Rajarshi Shahu scheme, link Aadhaar with bank account, and upload documents.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver and monthly boarding allowance.
eligibility_text: Scheduled Tribe students of Maharashtra pursuing higher education, with family income under 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Submit application online on MahaDBT under Tribal Development Department.

scheme_name: UP Post Matric Scholarship for General Category
benefits: Fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance based on course level.
eligibility_text: General category students resident in Uttar Pradesh, pursuing UG/PG courses with annual family income up to 2 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on UP Scholarship portal, submit online form, print and submit physical copy to college with attachments.

scheme_name: UP Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST
benefits: Full fee refund and monthly maintenance allowance.
eligibility_text: SC/ST candidates resident in Uttar Pradesh, pursuing post-matric courses with annual family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on UP Scholarship portal, verify Aadhaar via OTP, and submit institutional copy.

scheme_name: Karnataka Post Matric Scholarship for OBC
benefits: Fee reimbursement and hostel/boarding charges support.
eligibility_text: OBC students domiciled in Karnataka, enrolled in recognized institutions, with family income under 2.5 lakhs.
documents_required: Caste and Income certificate RD numbers
application_process: Apply via State Scholarship Portal (SSP), enter SSP ID, pull caste/income data from Kutumba, and submit.

scheme_name: Karnataka Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST
benefits: 100% fee reimbursement and free student hostel facilities.
eligibility_text: SC/ST students domiciled in Karnataka, enrolled in higher education with family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply through SSP, register and fetch caste certificate automatically, link Aadhaar.

scheme_name: Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
benefits: Monthly stipend ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 depending on the course of study.
eligibility_text: West Bengal residents who scored at least 60% in previous exam, pursuing UG or PG courses. Annual family income must be within 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on SVMCM portal, upload marksheets, income certificate, and bank details, submit for verification.

scheme_name: West Bengal Kanyashree K3 Scholarship
benefits: Monthly financial aid of ₹2,000 for Arts/Commerce and ₹2,500 for Science postgraduates.
eligibility_text: Girl students of West Bengal who passed UG degree with 45% marks and are enrolled in regular PG programs. No income bar.
application_process: Apply online under SVMCM portal using K2 details, and submit for PG verification.

scheme_name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Specially Abled Students
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum support for tuition fee and equipment purchase.
eligibility_text: Specially-abled students (disability >= 40%) admitted to AICTE approved technical courses. Family income up to 8 lakhs.
application_process: Register on NSP, select AICTE Saksham, fill online application, upload disability certificate.

scheme_name: AICTE Swanath Scholarship Scheme
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum support for college fees and books.
eligibility_text: Orphan children, or child of parent deceased due to COVID-19, or ward of Armed Forces/Central Paramilitary forces, studying in AICTE-approved colleges. Family income under 8 lakhs.
application_process: Apply via National Scholarship Portal under AICTE section.

scheme_name: Savitribai Jyotirao Phule Fellowship for Single Girl Child
benefits: Fellowship support of ₹31,000 p.m. for first 2 years, ₹35,000 p.m. for remaining years.
eligibility_text: Single girl child pursuing research / postgraduate programs in recognized universities. No income limit.
documents_required: Single Girl Child affidavit on non-judicial stamp paper
application_process: Register on the UGC fellowship portal when applications open and submit the single girl child affidavit.

scheme_name: UGC PG Scholarship for GATE qualified students
benefits: Monthly stipend of ₹12,400 during the 2-year Postgraduate program.
eligibility_text: GATE/GPAT qualified students admitted to regular M.Tech/M.Pharm courses in AICTE/UGC approved institutes.
application_process: Submit score details on UGC/AICTE portal for verification, get monthly direct benefit transfers.

scheme_name: LIC Golden Jubilee Scholarship
benefits: ₹20,000 per annum support paid in monthly installments.
eligibility_text: Students who passed Class 12 with at least 60% marks and are pursuing higher education. Family income under 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on the LIC India portal under Golden Jubilee Foundation link.

scheme_name: HDFC Bank Badhte Kadam Scholarship
benefits: ₹30,000 to ₹1,00,000 one-time support to cover tuition fees.
eligibility_text: Students enrolled in general or professional undergraduate or postgraduate programs, with annual family income under 6 lakhs. Priority to distressed students.
application_process: Apply online through Buddy4Study portal under HDFC Badhte Kadam listing.

scheme_name: Reliance Foundation Undergraduate Scholarship
benefits: Up to ₹2,00,000 total scholarship support over the course of study.
eligibility_text: First-year full-time undergraduate students in any stream. Family income up to 15 lakhs (priority below 2.5 lakhs). Minimum 60% in Class 12.
application_process: Apply online, clear the Reliance Foundation online aptitude test, upload certificates, and submit.

scheme_name: Tata Trusts Scholarship for UG Studies
benefits: Partial fee waiver and maintenance allowance depending on college fee structure.
eligibility_text: Undergraduate students studying in recognized institutions, with family income under 4 lakhs. Score threshold is 60% in last exam.
application_process: Apply online on the Tata Trusts portal during the application window.

scheme_name: L'Oreal India For Young Women in Science Scholarship
benefits: ₹2,500,000 total scholarship support distributed across UG years.
eligibility_text: Girl students who scored 85% in PCB/PCM in Class 12, admitted to science/engineering degree courses. Family income up to 6 lakhs.
application_process: Apply online, participate in the telephonic interview and subsequent selection round.

scheme_name: Aditya Birla Academic Scholarship
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver for premier business and engineering colleges (IITs/IIMs/BITS).
eligibility_text: Students enrolled in premier IITs, BITS Pilani, law colleges, or top IIMs. Selected via college提名 and interview. No income limit.
application_process: Nominated by college, fill application essay, attend interview in Mumbai.

scheme_name: Kotak Kanya Scholarship for Girls
benefits: ₹1,50,000 per year for undergraduate education.
eligibility_text: Girl students who scored 85% or above in Class 12, pursuing UG professional courses in recognized institutes. Family income under 6 lakhs.
application_process: Apply online through Buddy4Study under Kotak Kanya listing.

scheme_name: Punjab Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
benefits: Reimbursement of non-refundable fees and monthly maintenance allowance.
eligibility_text: OBC students resident in Punjab, enrolled in recognized institutions, with annual family income under 1.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply online on the Punjab scholarship portal, link Aadhaar.

scheme_name: Punjab CM Scholarship for Polytechnic Students
benefits: Tuition fee discount ranging from 70% to 100% depending on matriculation percentage.
eligibility_text: Punjab residents pursuing polytechnic diploma courses in government colleges, based on class 10 merit percentage. No income bar.
application_process: Apply at the time of admission at the government polytechnic college, discount is applied to fee slip automatically.

scheme_name: Delhi Govt Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
benefits: 100%, 50%, or 25% tuition fee waiver depending on income brackets.
eligibility_text: Delhi residents pursuing UG courses in Delhi State Universities, with family income under 6 lakhs. Minimum 60% marks in Class 12.
application_process: Apply on the e-District portal of Delhi Government, upload marksheets and income proof.

scheme_name: Delhi Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver and maintenance allowance.
eligibility_text: SC candidates resident in Delhi, pursuing post-matric courses with family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply via the e-District portal under the SC/ST Welfare Department section.

scheme_name: Rajasthan Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST
benefits: 100% tuition fee waiver and maintenance allowance for higher education.
eligibility_text: SC/ST candidates resident in Rajasthan, pursuing post-matric courses with family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on Rajasthan SSO portal under SJMS (Social Justice and Empowerment) application.

scheme_name: Rajasthan Post Matric Scholarship for OBC
benefits: Maintenance allowance and reimbursement of non-refundable fees.
eligibility_text: OBC students resident in Rajasthan, enrolled in recognized institutions, with family income under 1.5 lakhs.
application_process: Register on Rajasthan SSO portal, fill details in scholarship app, upload documents.

scheme_name: Rajasthan CM Sarvajan Higher Education Scholarship
benefits: ₹5,000 per annum support for undergraduate and postgraduate college education.
eligibility_text: Rajasthan residents pursuing regular higher education in recognized colleges. Family income must not exceed 5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply online on Rajasthan SSO portal under Higher Technical and Medical Education (HTE) department.

scheme_name: Rajasthan Devnarayan Scooty and Incentive Scheme
benefits: Free scooty and helmet, plus annual incentive of ₹10,000 for college girls.
eligibility_text: Girl students belonging to MBC/OBC categories of Rajasthan, scoring 50% or above in Class 12, pursuing UG degree.
application_process: Submit application online on SSO portal under HTE section.

scheme_name: Rajasthan Kalibai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme
benefits: Free scooty, registration, insurance, and 2 liters of petrol for meritorious girls.
eligibility_text: Meritorious girl students of Rajasthan (SC/ST/EBC/Minority/General) who passed class 12 from Rajasthan Board with minimum 65%.
application_process: Register on SSO Rajasthan portal, select Kalibai Scooty Scheme, upload files and submit.

scheme_name: Haryana Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
benefits: Full fee waiver and boarding/maintenance allowance.
eligibility_text: Scheduled Tribe students domiciled in Haryana, enrolled in post-matriculation courses with annual family income below 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Register on Har-Chhatrabratti portal and submit online application.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
benefits: Maintenance allowance and 50% tuition fee reimbursement for OBC students.
eligibility_text: OBC category students resident of Maharashtra, pursuing post-matric courses with annual family income up to 1.5 lakhs.
application_process: Register and apply on MahaDBT portal under VJNT, OBC and SBC Welfare Department.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Rajarshi Shahu Maharaj Scholarship for SC/ST
benefits: 100% tuition and exam fee waiver for SC/ST students in professional courses.
eligibility_text: SC/ST candidates resident in Maharashtra, pursuing higher professional education with family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Submit application online on MahaDBT portal under Social Justice and Special Assistance department.

scheme_name: Punjab Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
benefits: Reimbursement of non-refundable fees and monthly allowance.
eligibility_text: ST students domiciled in Punjab, studying post-matric courses with family income up to 2.5 lakhs.
application_process: Apply on the Punjab scholarship portal, link Aadhaar, submit online form.

scheme_name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
benefits: ₹12,000 per annum support to continue secondary and undergraduate studies.
eligibility_text: Students who cleared class 8 exam with 55% marks and family income within 3.5 lakhs per annum.
application_process: Apply online on National Scholarship Portal (NSP), clear the state-level NMMSS exam.

scheme_name: UGC PG Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child
benefits: ₹36,200 per annum support for postgraduate studies for 2 years.
eligibility_text: Single girl child up to 30 years of age, admitted to first-year postgraduate degree program in recognized universities. No income limit.
documents_required: Single Girl Child affidavit on stamp paper
application_process: Apply via National Scholarship Portal (NSP) under UGC section.

scheme_name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls - Diploma
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum support for girls in technical diploma courses.
eligibility_text: Girl students admitted to AICTE approved technical diploma course with family income up to 8 lakhs per annum.
application_process: Apply online on National Scholarship Portal (NSP) under AICTE Pragati Diploma section.

scheme_name: Haryana State Merit Scholarship
benefits: Annual merit-based cash prize and stipend for top academic performers.
eligibility_text: Top rank holders/meritorious students in board/university exams domiciled in Haryana pursuing higher education. No income ceiling.
application_process: Apply on Har-Chhatrabratti portal, select State Merit Scholarship scheme, upload certificates.

scheme_name: Maharashtra Govt Vidyaniketan Scholarship
benefits: Stipend of ₹100 per month for undergraduate college studies.
eligibility_text: Students who completed Class 10 from Government Vidyaniketan in Maharashtra and scored 60% or above. No income bar.
application_process: Apply online on MahaDBT portal under Social Justice & Special Assistance section.

scheme_name: National Fellowship for OBC Students
benefits: Fellowship support of ₹31,000 p.m. for first 2 years, ₹35,000 p.m. for remaining years.
eligibility_text: OBC candidates qualified in UGC-NET or CSIR-NET and pursuing M.Phil/Ph.D. No income bar.
application_process: Apply online on NSP under Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment section.
